bgp-not-establishing.entry_symptom: BGP peer stuck in Idle/Active/Connect state

route-missing-hardware.display_name: Route missing from hardware forwarding table
route-missing-hardware.entry_symptom: Route visible in control plane but traffic not forwarding

port-down.entry_symptom: Interface shows down or no link

express-reboot-failure.entry_symptom: Express reboot failed, aborted, or switch came up in degraded state

vlan-not-programming.entry_symptom: VLAN configured but traffic not forwarding on VLAN members

lag-not-forming.entry_symptom: PortChannel members not aggregating or LACP not negotiating

bfd-flapping.entry_symptom: BFD session cycling between Up and Down states
